message:
Merge PR #2190: fix(witness): remove hardcoded Mayor role refs

Replace hardcoded "escalate to Mayor" strings with data-driven messages
that report cleanup_status values, removing role coupling from handlers.

PR: https://github.com/steveyegge/gastown/pull/2190
Co-authored-by: Chris Deal <DreadPirateRobertz@users.noreply.github.com>
